title: intruder siluet
description: changes the siluet/r2 from The Broken Script to have the intruder's face from The Mandela Catalogue
body:
needs [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script) or it won't change anything.

i modified the intruder's face from [The Mandela Catalogue](https://www.youtube.com/@AlexxKister/featured) to my liking and put it on r2, that's it.

by my liking i mean: something that would maintain the disturbing factor without making it look goofy.
